references.passiveText: Some of the old-timers say this land has always been unlucky. That the misfortune isn't random.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} keeps records going back generations, and the pattern is disturbing: every twenty years or so, {location} suffers a catastrophic setback. Blight, collapse, drought, each one different but the timing is uncanny. If there's a cause behind the pattern, understanding it could save the next generation from repeating the cycle.

references.passiveText: There's a trader who deals in rare remedies, but their prices are ruinous and their methods questionable.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} operates out of a hidden camp {location_hint}. They have access to ingredients that nobody else can source, but they charge desperate prices and ask no questions about where their payments come from. If you're in a bind, they're an option: just not a comfortable one.
